rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It correctly identified the root cause (subPath ConfigMap mounts not auto-refreshing, so the rabbitmq_prometheus plugin was not active), performed a rolling restart of the StatefulSet to pick up the current ConfigMap, added a Prometheus scrape job targeting all 3 pod DNS names via the headless service on port 15692, and added a recording rule to expose rabbitmq_up as an alias for up{job="rabbitmq"}. The final verification confirms all three requirements: 3 RabbitMQ pods Running, all 3 RabbitMQ targets health=up in Prometheus, and rabbitmq_up query returns exactly 3 samples each with value 1. The oracle verdict is pass. Only native Kubernetes resources were used (ConfigMap patch, StatefulSet rollout restart, Prometheus lifecycle reload endpoint).
